question.label: Priority ranking
question.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?
question.description: Forces a real priority ranking. Vague answers are a clarity signal.

answer: I want to focus first on unblocking the one dependency that is slowing the team the most this week.

assessment.note: Names a specific top priority and its rationale — unblocking the team's main dependency this week — showing strong clarity and some ownership.

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
